name: workflow state contract validator rejects a current_phase value not in the registered phase set
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf '{"session_id":"s1","current_phase":"made-up"}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/workflow-state.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/validate-state-contract.sh" --state .claude-tdd-pro/workflow-state.json --check phase 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'invalid_current_phase=made-up' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
